meta.description: A spring map that knows where water is flowing right now. Official CHMI measurements, refreshed nightly. Free, no account, no ads.

mock.mapAria: Preview of the Studánky map screen
mock.detailAria: Preview of a spring detail in Studánky

hero.titleLine1: Stop hauling litres on your back.
hero.titleLine2: Route your trip past a spring.
hero.description: Studánky shows where water is flowing right now — from CHMI measurements, refreshed every night. Check the map, plan your route past water, and leave the spare bottle at home.
hero.qrNote: Point your camera at the code
hero.qrAlt: QR code to download the Studánky app
hero.disclaimer: Flowing water does not mean drinkable water.

lines: An extra litre of water is an extra kilo on your back.
Maps show you the spring. Whether it flows, they won't say.
And the last review? "Lovely spot." Three years ago.

bento.title: What the app does
bento.description: No accounts, no route planners, no ads. Just a map that knows where water flows.

map.title: Flowing? Dry? See it instantly
map.text: Every spring carries its state — readable at a glance, and not by colour alone.

freshness.title: Straight about old data
freshness.text: If nobody has checked for 14 days, we say "we don't know". A stale "flowing" is worse than none.

history.title: Measurement history
history.text: How does a spring hold up through summer? Flow over time tells you which ones to trust.

navigate.title: Navigate in one tap
navigate.text: You plan routes your way — we just hand the spring to Mapy, Google, or whoever you like.

favorites.title: Favourites
favorites.text: The one below the ridge, the one by the cabin. Springs you return to, one tap away.

share.title: Pass it on
share.text: A spring link opens right in your friends' app. This code, by the way, leads to ours.

showcase.title: What the app looks like
showcase.description: Search, pins, detail — like the maps you're used to. Just water-blue and readable in direct sun.
showcase.note: Illustrative interface — the final app may differ.

map.title: Map
map.caption: Three marker states and place search.

detail.title: Spring detail
detail.caption: Status, data age, and history together.

steps.title: How it works
steps.description: Studánky doesn't plan routes — it's your eyes in the field. You plan where you always have.

items.title: Open the map
items.description: Where's the trip headed? And which springs are on the way?

items.title: Check the status
items.description: Flowing, dry — and when someone last looked.

items.title: Head out
items.description: Send the spring to your navigation and refill along the way.

data.title: Data from CHMI measurements
data.description: Spring status comes from regular measurements by the Czech Hydrometeorological Institute. We fetch it every night so your morning planning holds up.

stats.label: springs measured by CHMI across Czechia

data.disclaimer: Flowing water does not mean drinkable water. Studánky reports the measured flow; it does not verify water safety — use at your own risk.

roadmap.title: Where we're headed
roadmap.description: We're starting with the springs CHMI measures. The goal is bigger: a living map updated by hikers themselves. People helping people.

phases.title: Map with CHMI measurements
phases.description: About 300 springs, flow and measurement history. Fresh data every night.

phases.title: Reports straight from the springs
phases.description: A stainless QR code at the spring: scan it, tap "flowing" — and help everyone who arrives after you. Works offline too.

phases.title: Points for revived springs
phases.description: The longer a spring has gone unreported, the more points a fresh report earns. Trips get a mission.

newsletter.title: Want to know when we move?
newsletter.description: An occasional email when we ship something new. No spam — we have an app to build.
newsletter.success: Thanks! We'll be in touch when there's something to show.
newsletter.errorInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
newsletter.errorServer: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
newsletter.privacyNote: We'll only use your email for Studánky updates. Unsubscribe in one click.

community.title: People helping people
community.description: Studánky runs on a simple exchange: you plan your trip by other people's reports — and next time you're the one reporting whether the water flows. No company behind it. Just people who go outside.

points.title: Pass it on
points.description: The biggest help? Share Studánky with the people you go outside with. The more of us, the fresher the map.

points.title: Know a spring?
points.description: Missing from the map, or listed wrong? Let us know.

points.title: Want to do more?
points.description: Spreading the word, ideas, marketing, code — the app and this site are open. Reach out; every pair of hands counts.

faq.title: Common questions
faq.description: Short and straight — money, data, drinkability.

items.question: Is the app free?
items.answer: Yes. The app is free, with no sign-up and no ads. Studánky is a community open source project.

items.question: Is spring water drinkable?
items.answer: We don't know and we don't claim to. We only show whether water flow has been reported — nobody verifies safety. Tasting it is your call and your responsibility.

items.question: Where does the data come from?
items.answer: From open data of the Czech Hydrometeorological Institute, which regularly measures flow at roughly 300 springs across the country. We fetch it every night and put it on the map.

items.question: What does "outdated" mean?
items.answer: The latest measurement is over 14 days old. Things may have changed since, so we say so plainly instead of claiming a stale "flowing" or "dry".

items.question: Can I report a spring's status myself?
items.answer: Not yet — reports via QR codes right at the springs are coming in the next phase. Leave us your email and we'll tell you when it launches.

items.question: Does the app work offline?
items.answer: The map needs a connection — you'll use it most at home while planning anyway. An offline mode is planned for future field reporting.

download.title: Get Studánky
download.description: For iPhone and Android. Free and ad-free.
download.qrNote: The code takes you straight to the download.
download.qrAlt: QR code to download the Studánky app
download.disclaimer: Flowing water does not mean drinkable water.

footer.tagline: Made with love for the Czech landscape.
footer.disclaimer: Flowing water does not mean drinkable water. The app does not verify water safety; use at your own risk.

common.disclaimer: The operator keeps this document aligned with the current state of the service. The version published on this page is always authoritative.

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy of the Studánky service: on-device location processing, Mapy.com map services, the newsletter, and technical logs.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: This document describes how the operator of the Studánky service processes personal data in the mobile app and on the website. The app requires no user account, displays no advertising, and uses no analytics tools.

items.label: Controller
items.text: [FULL NAME / BUSINESS NAME], ID number: [ID NUMBER], registered address: [ADDRESS].

items.label: Privacy contact
items.text: [EMAIL]

sections.title: Key principles
bullets: The app requires no registration or user account.
The app uses no advertising systems, analytics tools, user tracking, or crash reporting.
Location is processed exclusively on the device, and only after the system permission is granted.
The app is read-only; users do not submit their own content or spring status records through it.
The list of favourite springs is stored only on the user's device.

items.label: Location
items.text: Optional feature. After the system permission is granted, the app processes location solely to display the current position and center the map. Location does not leave the device and is not transmitted to the operator or its backend. Legal basis: consent granted through the system permission. Retention by the operator: none. Processing can be ended at any time by revoking the permission in device settings.

items.label: Favourite springs
items.text: Optional feature. The list of favourites is stored exclusively on the device. Legal basis: performance of a feature requested by the user. Retention: until removed in the app, until app data is cleared, or until the app is uninstalled. Recipients: none.

items.label: Map data and search
items.text: Part of the app's core functionality. Map tiles, search, and autocomplete are provided by Seznam.cz, a.s. through the Mapy.com service. When these services are used, the IP address, technical request parameters, search queries, map tile requests, and the visible map viewport are transmitted to the provider's servers. If the map is centered on the device's location, these requests may indirectly correspond to the area in which the user is located. Seznam.cz acts as an independent controller for its map services and, under its own policies, also processes statistical, technical, and user-activity data.

items.label: App backend
items.text: The app loads public spring data from the operator's backend. The backend does not store IP addresses, device location, map viewport, or technical request logs of the mobile app; request parameters are processed solely to return the response and are not retained. Infrastructure layers (hosting, reverse proxy, CDN) may, depending on configuration, process technical access logs for [INFRASTRUCTURE LOG RETENTION / NOT STORED].

items.label: Server logs
items.text: For operational and security purposes, the IP address, request time, requested URL, browser identification (user-agent), and response status code may be retained for a limited period. Legal basis: legitimate interest in operating and securing the website. Retention period: [WEB LOG RETENTION, e.g. 30 days].

items.label: Newsletter
items.text: Optional service. Upon subscription to project updates, the email address, time of subscription, version of the granted consent, selected language, and identification of the form used for the subscription are stored. Legal basis: consent. Retention: until consent is withdrawn (unsubscription), and thereafter for [CONSENT EVIDENCE RETENTION] to evidence the consent. Subscribing does not create a user account.

items.label: Form protection
items.text: To protect the form against abuse, a hash of the IP address is processed briefly for rate limiting. This is not an analytics or tracking tool. Retention: no longer than 24 hours, or until the server process restarts.

items.label: Language setting
items.text: The website stores the technical NEXT_LOCALE cookie to preserve the selected language and a browser local-storage entry to keep an informational banner hidden. Legal basis: legitimate interest in the proper functioning of the website. These are not analytics or advertising tools.

items.label: Hosting and backend
items.text: [HOSTING / BACKEND PROVIDER] supports the operation of the website, backend, and infrastructure. Role: [PROCESSOR / INDEPENDENT CONTROLLER]. Processing country: [COUNTRY]. Transfers outside the EU/EEA: [NO / YES, COUNTRY AND MECHANISM].

items.label: Mapy.com / Seznam.cz
items.text: Map tiles, search, and autocomplete are loaded from Mapy.com / Seznam.cz servers. Seznam.cz acts as an independent controller for its map services and processes data under its own Mapy.com privacy policy.

items.label: Newsletter
items.text: [NEWSLETTER / STRAPI BACKEND PROVIDER] supports the storage and administration of newsletter subscriptions. Role: [PROCESSOR / INDEPENDENT CONTROLLER]. Processing country: [COUNTRY]. Transfers outside the EU/EEA: [NO / YES, COUNTRY AND MECHANISM].

items.label: Legal obligations
items.text: Data may be disclosed to public authorities or legal advisers where required by law or necessary to protect the operator's rights.

sections.title: Retention and erasure
paragraphs: The location permission can be changed at any time in device settings. Locally stored favourites can be removed in the app, by clearing app data, or by uninstalling the app.

Newsletter data is erased upon unsubscription or upon a request sent to [EMAIL]. Technical website logs are deleted automatically after the stated retention period. Other erasure requests may be submitted to [EMAIL].

sections.title: Rights of data subjects
paragraphs: Subject to the conditions of the GDPR, data subjects have the right of access to their personal data, the right to rectification or erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, and the right to object to processing. Requests are received at [EMAIL].
Consent may be withdrawn at any time with effect for the future; the lawfulness of processing carried out before the withdrawal remains unaffected.
Data subjects also have the right to lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority, the Czech Office for Personal Data Protection.

links.label: Czech Office for Personal Data Protection

sections.title: Changes to this policy
paragraphs: If features involving the processing of additional personal data are added to the service, this policy will be updated before their release. The current version published on this page is always authoritative.

terms.metaDescription: Terms of use of the Studánky app and website: nature of the service, water quality notice, source data licences, and limitation of liability.
terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.description: These terms govern the use of the Studánky mobile app and the studankyapp.cz website. The service is provided free of charge and is of a purely informational nature.

sections.title: Operator and scope of the service
paragraphs: The service is operated by [FULL NAME / BUSINESS NAME], ID number: [ID NUMBER], email: [EMAIL] (the “operator”).
Studánky is a free informational service for mobile devices and the web. It displays springs on a map together with data on water flow or spring yield and related project information.

sections.title: Notice regarding water quality
paragraphs: The service provides information on the flow or yield of water sources. It provides no information on the drinkability or safety of the water and makes no representation to that effect.

The operator does not verify water quality. Any decision to use the water is made by the user solely at their own responsibility and risk. The actual condition of a water source may change faster than the data in the service is updated.

sections.title: Nature of the service
paragraphs: The service is not a health, hygiene, navigation, or rescue service and does not replace professional assessment. It serves as a supplementary source of information, not as the sole basis for decisions outdoors.
Device location is used exclusively for orientation on the map and for centering the map, and only after the system permission is granted.

items.label: CHMI data
items.text: Spring yield data originates from open data of the Czech Hydrometeorological Institute, provided under the CC BY 4.0 licence. The data is modified and simplified for the purposes of the service. CHMI does not operate, endorse, or approve the service.

items.label: Mapy.com
items.text: Map data and search are provided by Seznam.cz, a.s. through the Mapy.com service. Map tiles and API outputs may not be copied, stored, or redistributed beyond the scope permitted by the Mapy.com terms.

items.label: Service content
items.text: Original texts, visual design, databases, and other components of the service belong to the operator unless stated otherwise.

sections.title: Rules of use
bullets: The service may not be used in a manner that overloads it or disrupts its operation.
Bulk downloading of map or other data beyond ordinary use of the service is not permitted.
Links and future community features may not be misused to disseminate false information.

sections.title: Limitation of liability
paragraphs: Data displayed in the service may be incomplete, inaccurate, or outdated. To the extent permitted by law, the operator is not liable for harm arising from the use of the displayed information or from the use of water from the sources shown in the service.
Nothing in these terms affects rights of the user that cannot be contractually excluded or limited under the laws of the Czech Republic.

sections.title: Availability and changes to the service
paragraphs: The service is provided as available. The operator may modify, suspend, or discontinue the service, in particular for operational, security, licensing, or legal reasons.

sections.title: Governing law and dispute resolution
paragraphs: Legal relationships arising in connection with the use of the service are governed by the laws of the Czech Republic. Consumers are entitled to out-of-court resolution of consumer disputes before the Czech Trade Inspection Authority.

dataSources.metaDescription: Overview of the data sources of the Studánky service: CHMI open data under the CC BY 4.0 licence and Mapy.com map data.
dataSources.title: Data Sources
dataSources.description: An overview of the data sources and map data used by the Studánky service, including licensing terms and attribution.

sections.title: Spring yield data
paragraphs: Source: Czech Hydrometeorological Institute (CHMI), open data.
Licence: Creative Commons BY 4.0.
The data is modified for the purposes of the service: it is aggregated, simplified, and converted into the states flowing / not flowing / outdated.
CHMI does not operate, endorse, or approve the service.

sections.title: Map data and search
paragraphs: Map data, tiles, and selected map services are provided by Seznam.cz, a.s. under the Mapy.com brand.
Mapy.com attribution is displayed directly next to the map and must remain visible.
When search or autocomplete is used, the app may communicate with Mapy.com / Seznam.cz services.

sections.title: Licensing restrictions
bullets: Map tiles and API outputs may not be stored beyond authorised use.
Service data may not be scraped, pre-cached, or bulk-exported.
The app uses its own API key, which is protected against misuse.

contact.metaDescription: Contact details of the operator of the Studánky service for legal matters, personal data protection, and error reports.
contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Contact details of the operator of the Studánky service and an overview of the matters handled through them.
